title: Iran's government 'seriously fractured' — Trump cites as reason for extension
snippet: Al Jazeera reports Trump described Iran's government as 'seriously fractured' in his Truth Social post, citing this internal division as a strategic reason for extending rather than resuming bombing. The report provides context on the IRGC-diplomat rift and Vahidi's control as evidence for Trump's claim.
tag_reason: 트럼프의 '심각하게 분열된 정부' 발언과 이란 내부 권력 투쟁 연결 분석은 기존 IRGC-외교관 갈등 보도(4/18-20)의 맥락이지만, 트럼프가 이를 연장 근거로 활용한 점은 신규 정보.
